response.justification: While Bogdan has strong experience as a senior and staff software engineer with distributed systems and a solid track record of mentoring, he severely lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience. His professional background is primarily in full-stack and web development using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with less than a year of professional C++ experience from 2015. Given that this is a Technical Lead role for a cloud compute platform demanding deep C++ expertise, he is not a suitable fit.
strengths: Strong track record of technical mentoring and knowledge sharing, evidenced by organizing Refactoring Dojos and leading technical workshops.
Solid experience with high-throughput distributed systems, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Demonstrated ability to establish engineering best practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
concerns: Critically lacks the minimum required 8 years of C++ programming experience, possessing only a few months of professional C++ exposure from 2015.
Background heavily leans toward full-stack web and product development rather than core cloud compute platform infrastructure or hardware architecture.
Lacks explicit experience as a formal Technical Lead managing cross-team alignment, project priorities, and deliverables for large-scale cloud platforms.
